title: Amend your tax return
description: Find out how to correct or fix a tax return if you make a mistake or, contact us if we've made an error.
keywords: change my return, fix a mistake, notice of assessment, refund, amendment, amend, amend return, amend tax return, amendment, correct, correction,  error, false, mistake, incorrect, mistake

child_links.title: Before you amend your tax return
child_links.description: Find out when you need to correct your tax return and what you need to know before you do it.

child_links.title: How to request an amendment to your tax return
child_links.description: Check the options available to lodge an amendment to your tax return, fix a mistake or include additional information.

child_links.title: Time limits on tax return amendments
child_links.description: Find out the time limit to amend your assessment if you're an individual or a sole trader.

child_links.title: Amend a return for repayment of income
child_links.description: When you can apply to amend your tax return if you have to repay income, whether you were entitled to the income or not.

source_title: Amend your tax return | Australian Taxation Office
source_description: Find out how to correct or fix a tax return if you make a mistake or, contact us if we've made an error.
